openFindings.title: Static router parser marks shipped router styles as unknown
openFindings.summary: detectVariant only recognizes three router shapes. Skills using LANGUAGE_KEYWORDS or INTENT_MODEL without LOAD_LEVELS fall into unknown, yielding UNKNOWN routes and allowedResourceCount 0.

openFindings.title: Skill names are joined into filesystem paths without containment validation
openFindings.summary: predictSmartRouterRoute accepts skill as a raw path segment. A crafted selectedSkill can escape .opencode/skill before parseRouterModel reads SKILL.md and resource trees.

openFindings.title: Observe-only wrapper can throw during configure
openFindings.summary: onToolCall is fail-closed with try/catch, but configure and configureSmartRouterSession are not. Invalid runtime input can throw before telemetry becomes observe-only.

openFindings.title: Analyzer collapses records by promptId alone
openFindings.summary: Telemetry from different selected skills or sessions sharing a promptId is merged into one row and attributed to the first selectedSkill, undercounting later records.

openFindings.title: Live-session wrapper has no direct test coverage
openFindings.summary: The exported configure/onToolCall/finalize path is production integration code, but the scoped test suite only exercises measurement and analyzer behavior.

openFindings.title: CLI limit parsing accepts NaN and negative values silently
openFindings.summary: --limit is converted with Number() and passed into slice without finite/non-negative validation, so bad input can silently produce empty or truncated measurements.
